description.pt1: Building high-impact web, mobile, and backend systems at scale.
description.pt2: From billions of records to real-time failover, engineered to perform.

aboutSection.label: About me
aboutSection.title: Engineering systems that scale and deliver real impact.

description.pt1: I'm a fullstack developer with 6+ years of experience building web, mobile, and backend systems across betting, enterprise automation, and logistics.
description.pt2: I've worked on systems handling billions of records, built real-time failover infrastructure across microservices, and delivered features that drove measurable revenue growth.
description.pt3: I'm comfortable owning full delivery cycles, from architecture decisions to production, working independently or embedded in cross-functional teams.

contactSection.label: Contact
contactSection.title: Let's work together
contactSection.description: Open to freelance projects and full-time opportunities, local or international. I respond within 24 hours.

01.title: NexusCRM
01.description: Fullstack CRM built for businesses that rely on WhatsApp, Instagram and Facebook as their primary communication channel. Features real-time messaging, contact and pipeline management, and automated workflows.

02.title: Speaker Trainer for Business
02.description: AI-powered web app for deliberate speaking practice under professional pressure. Users record responses to high-stakes scenarios, receive automated feedback across 5 criteria, re-record, and see improvement between attempts.

bullets: Delivered high-impact features for a regulated betting platform serving the Brazilian market, working across microservices, real-time systems, and fullstack development.
Built an automated failover system across microservices on AWS that detects provider outages and switches in real time, ensuring continuous platform availability.
Participated in a cross-continental migration of billions of records from EU to Brazil using AWS and Python, ensuring zero data loss.
Developed a fullstack referral system in a 2-person team that drove approximately 10% revenue growth.
Built and maintained mission-critical automation pipelines and internal systems for enterprise clients, eliminating manual workflows and improving operational visibility.
Designed an automation pipeline integrating 3 databases with Lecom, DocuSign, and Feedz via REST APIs, reducing a 4-day process to 2 hours.
Built a fullstack asset management system with NestJS and Next.js from scratch to replace Excel-based tracking, delivering instant reporting.
Worked across multiple client projects including an AbInBev enterprise product and a US manufacturing client, delivering fullstack features and data infrastructure independently.
Joined an AbInBev project 1 month behind schedule as the sole fullstack developer, onboarded in 2 weeks, and recovered the timeline within 1 month.
Architected an AWS message queue to process millions of Excel records asynchronously, preventing API blocking under high load, delivered solo in 2 weeks.
Joined as the sole React Native developer in a 5-person company and was promoted to fullstack within 1 month, owning both mobile and web delivery for a wholesale management product.
Built a mobile inventory feature integrating QR Code scanning and voice recognition to eliminate manual stock-taking operations.
Developed a fullstack damage reporting system in React and Java/Spring Boot with AWS integration, enabling real-time truck tracking and photo-based damage registration.
